compiler.finite_codomain_warning: This finite 2048-mask compiler cannot be a SAT-complete reduction for unbounded CNF without a parameterized target-family extension.
compiler.output_size_bound: at most 11 primitive D20 cycles plus one certified finite transport row
compiler.output_surface: 11-bit D20 primitive basis-cycle activation mask plus finite sector-33 transport annotation

decision.reason: A deterministic public CNF-to-D20-mask compiler candidate now exists and recomputes sector-33 transport from emitted circuit data. It is a finite public fingerprint and fails the truth-diverse SAT-preservation probe, so it is not a SAT reduction.

next_highest_yield_item.action: Refresh the full no-escape closure ledger against the certified encoded-family reduction.

non_claims: This is not a SAT-complete reduction.
This finite 2048-mask target cannot carry an unbounded asymptotic separation by itself.
The nonzero e33 residual predicate is not equivalent to CNF satisfiability on the probe surface.
This does not prove P != NP.
